title: The Still Alarm
writer: Joseph Arthur, Harvey J. O'Higgins, A.C. Wheeler
actors: Helene Chadwick, William Russell, Richard Travers
plot: Lucy Fay leaves her husband, Richard, a fireman, for a suave politician, Perry Dunn. Richard compensates for the loss by adopting Drina, a baby girl whose mother perished in a fire. Drina develops into a beautiful young lady and b...
